reviews.comment:
(Translated by Google) I'm impressed that you can choose your own Ethiopian coffee beans. The store is clean, and the large windows prevent it from feeling stuffy, making it perfect for reading a book while sipping coffee. The staff are also friendly. I think I'll be coming here often.

(Original)
에티오피아 원두 선택이 가능한 곳이라니.. 감동적입니다. 매장도 깨끗하고 통창이라 답답한 느낌이 없어서 커피 마시면서 책 읽기 딱 좋아요. 직원분들도 친절해요. 자주 올것 같습니다.

reviewReply.comment: We’re delighted you enjoyed the Ethiopian brew and our café vibe! It means a lot to know the space feels welcoming for both coffee and company. We look forward to seeing you again soon.

reviewReply.comment: Cheers to you for the perfect rating! We're thrilled you enjoyed your time at Coffee Island

reviews.comment:
It was my first time visiting Coffee Island, and I must say I was pleasantly surprised by the entire experience. I ordered the herb chicken open puff along with a nitro bubble brew, and both were absolutely delightful. The coffee was rich and smooth, and the puff was fresh, flavorful, and perfectly baked.
What really stood out was the warm and welcoming service — since it was my first order, the staff even gave me a 10% discount, which was such a thoughtful gesture. The place was spotless, with excellent upkeep, and the ambiance made it a perfect spot to relax and enjoy my coffee.
Overall, I had a wonderful time at Coffee Island and truly appreciated the combination of great coffee, tasty food, friendly service, and a clean, inviting atmosphere. Will surely be visiting again soon!

reviewReply.comment:
Hi Ankit,
We’re thrilled to know your very first visit to Coffee Island turned into such a memorable one! Delighted you enjoyed the herb chicken open puff and nitro bubble brew - both are crafted to be comforting yet exciting. It’s wonderful to hear our team and ambiance added to the experience. We look forward to welcoming you back soon for more great coffee moments.
